name: Button
description: Action trigger in three visual weights. Renders a real <a> when href is given, otherwise a <button>.

variants.name: primary
variants.use: The one main action of a page or section.

variants.name: secondary
variants.use: Alternative actions next to a primary one.

variants.name: ghost
variants.use: Tertiary actions with minimal visual weight.

useCases: Call-to-action links (contact, view project) — pass href
Form submissions and interactive triggers — real <button>

antiPatterns.scenario: Multiple primary buttons in the same section
antiPatterns.reason: Competing accents break the poster-like colour logic and the visual hierarchy.
antiPatterns.alternative: One primary, everything else secondary or ghost.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Button for plain inline navigation
antiPatterns.reason: Inline links inside copy should look like text, not controls.
antiPatterns.alternative: A plain <a>, styled by the global link rules.

selectionCriteria.usePrimary: Main action the visitor should take

a11y: href renders <a>, everything else a real <button> with an explicit type
Focus ring comes from the global :focus-visible rule
